```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;text-align:left;">

 <div style="position:relative;background:rgba(255,184,77,0.08);border-left:5px solid #FFB84D;border-radius:0 14px 14px 0;padding:1.4em 1.7em 1.5em;margin-bottom:1em;">
  <div style="position:absolute;top:0.4em;left:0.7em;font-family:'Georgia',serif;font-size:5em;color:#FFB84D;line-height:0.7;opacity:0.18;user-select:none;">"</div>
  <div style="position:relative;font-size:0.85em;line-height:1.6;color:#F8F7F0;font-style:italic;font-family:'Georgia','TsangerJinKai',serif;">
   AI is a powerful <span style="color:#FFB84D;font-style:normal;font-weight:700;">collaborator</span>. It is not a competent <span style="color:#FFB84D;font-style:normal;font-weight:700;">analyst</span>.<br>The difference is <span style="color:#FFB84D;font-style:normal;font-weight:700;">who signs the paper</span>.
  </div>
  <div style="margin-top:0.7em;text-align:right;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#9B8EA0;">
   — closing thought
  </div>
 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:1em;text-align:center;background:rgba(255,184,77,0.12);border:1px dashed rgba(255,184,77,0.4);border-radius:12px;padding:0.85em 1em;">
  <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#FFB84D;letter-spacing:0.14em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.35em;">thank you</div>
  <div style="font-size:0.7em;color:#F8F7F0;line-height:1.5;">
   <a href="https://pingfanhu.com" style="color:#F8F7F0;text-decoration:none;border-bottom:1px solid #FFB84D;">Pingfan Hu</a>
   &nbsp;·&nbsp;
   <a href="https://www.jhelvy.com" style="color:#F8F7F0;text-decoration:none;border-bottom:1px solid #FFB84D;">Dr. John Helveston</a>
  </div>
  <div style="margin-top:0.45em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;">
   2026 Agentic Engineering Workshop &nbsp;·&nbsp; The George Washington University
  </div>
 </div>

</div>
```
